title: callista stuartii
intro: Callista stuartii, also known as the Stuart's callista, is a species of sea snail that is commonly referred to as a type of marine gastropod mollusk. The plant is not a type of Callista stuartii, however, Callista stuartii is a species of marine mollusk. However, I can tell you about the plant that is sometimes referred to as Callista stuartii, which is actually a type of tree called Callistemon stuartii.
